assertionDescription: README.md provides accurate installation, usage, and contribution instructions suitable for OSS
testProcedure: 1. Verified README.md exists and is readable
2. Confirmed README.md contains all required OSS sections:
3. Verified cross-references between README.md and docs-site/docs.md are consistent
4. Confirmed Quickstart commands match (onboard-all.sh, fft tui, fft doctor)
5. Verified runtime mode documentation (Docker default, host optional)
6. Checked that project description matches across all documentation files
observations: README.md is comprehensive with 580 lines covering all major aspects
Quickstart section clearly shows canonical install path using ./scripts/onboard-all.sh
Architecture section describes single-process Node.js host with container isolation
Telegram and WhatsApp operations are documented with configuration examples
Coding delegation via /coder command is explained
Main workspace (~/nano) and heartbeat system are documented
Pi-Native skills section explains both setup-only and runtime skills
Development checks (npm run typecheck, npm test, npm run format:check) are listed
Distribution policy clarifies GitHub Releases as official channel
docs-site/docs.md cross-references are consistent with README.md
All commands and configuration examples are accurate and up-to-date

evidence.crossReferenceChecks: All cross-references between README.md and docs-site/docs.md are consistent

reasoning: README.md provides accurate, comprehensive OSS documentation covering installation (onboard-all.sh), usage (fft commands, Telegram/WhatsApp setup), contribution guidelines (via CONTRIBUTING.md reference), and all required sections. No inaccurate claims detected. Cross-references are consistent across documentation files.
